title: Blue Canyon Round Mirror, 40 cm Length x 40 cm Width, White
features: 【 MULTI-USE ROUND MIRROR 】 - This mirror décor can be hung in any room of the home. The classic white finish makes this an ideal addition to any bathroom, bedroom, hallway, or living room. it will also fit in perfectly with almost any home décor.

【 QUALITY MATERIAL 】: Blue Canyon wall mirror is made of high-quality glass, which can prevent deformation and warpage, and reflect light well, achieving high definition, distortion-free reflection imaging effects.

【 ENHANCEMENT OF HOME LIGHT 】- A white round mirror can help enhance the lighting in your home by reflecting natural light or artificial light sources, making your space feel brighter and more open and easier to clean and maintain.
【 EASY AND SAFE TO INSTALL 】- The large round mirror is designed for easy installation, with a simple mounting system. You can install this mirror quickly and easily on any wall in your home.

【 BORDER DESIGN 】- A round wall mirror with a white glass border provides a clean and modern look that complements a wide range of decor styles. The sleek and simple design of the white glass border allows the mirror to be a versatile and timeless addition to any room in your home.
description: Product Description This mirror's Modern and minimal look will automatically adjust itself to any space of your home. Thoughtfully handcrafted, this unique piece is easy to install and will instantly add depth and reflective beauty to your home interior. This round wall mirror is 40 cm wide in diameter with a 1-inch thickness. It is carefully constructed with high quality. This mirror is waterproof and rustproof. Made with high-quality glass through polishing, precision coatings, and special sealant this piece gives you the experience of high-quality image and perfect reflection.
